title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Adhesives & Allied Products

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Adhesives & Allied Products
jsonLd.description:
We at Adhesives & Allied Products are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Adhesives & Allied Products:
Adhesives & Allied Products is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adhesives & Allied Products!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
